title: Asset Manifest
description: Schema for the game asset manifest. See docs/core/manifest-contract.md.

cdnBase.description: Base URL or path for assets (e.g. /assets or https://cdn.example.com/game/assets)

localBase.description: Optional fallback path if CDN is unavailable

bundles.description: List of asset bundles; bundle names must be unique

alias.description: Unique identifier for this asset across all bundles

src.description: Path relative to cdnBase; no leading slash, no .., no absolute URLs

data.description: Optional loader-specific data (e.g., spritesheet JSON metadata)

type.description: Content type hint. When omitted, the loader infers type from file extension or bundle kind.

tags.description: Freeform tags for filtering, grouping, or generation metadata

name.description: Unique bundle name; prefer reserved prefix (boot-, theme-, audio-, core-, scene-, fx-, data-)

kind.description: Optional semantic classification. When present, overrides prefix-based inference for validation. If both kind and a name prefix are present, they must be consistent.
